tEn: ProlificDreamer: High-Fidelity and Diverse Text-to-3D Generation with Variational Score Distillation
tZh: ProlificDreamer：基于变分分数蒸馏的高保真、多样化文本到3D生成
sEn: ProlificDreamer introduces variational score distillation (VSD) to address over-saturation, over-smoothing, and low-diversity in text-to-3D generation, achieving high-fidelity and diverse results.
sZh: ProlificDreamer提出变分分数蒸馏（VSD），解决了文本到3D生成中的过饱和、过平滑和低多样性问题，实现了高保真和多样化的结果。
absEn: Score distillation sampling (SDS) has shown great promise in text-to-3D generation by distilling pretrained large-scale text-to-image diffusion models, but suffers from over-saturation, over-smoothing, and low-diversity problems. In this work, we propose to model the 3D parameter as a random variable instead of a constant as in SDS and present variational score distillation (VSD), a principled particle-based variational framework to explain and address the aforementioned issues in text-to-3D generation. We show that SDS is a special case of VSD and leads to poor samples with both small and large CFG weights. In comparison, VSD works well with various CFG weights as ancestral sampling from diffusion models and simultaneously improves the diversity and sample quality with a common CFG weight (i.e., $7.5$). We further present various improvements in the design space for text-to-3D such as distillation time schedule and density initialization, which are orthogonal to the distillation algorithm yet not well explored. Our overall approach, dubbed ProlificDreamer, can generate high rendering resolution (i.e., $512\times512$) and high-fidelity NeRF with rich structure and complex effects (e.g., smoke and drops). Further, initialized from NeRF, meshes fine-tuned by VSD are meticulously detailed and photo-realistic. Project page and codes: https://ml.cs.tsinghua.edu.cn/prolificdreamer/
absZh: 分数蒸馏采样（SDS）通过蒸馏预训练的大规模文本到图像扩散模型，在文本到3D生成中显示出巨大潜力，但存在过饱和、过平滑和低多样性问题。在这项工作中，我们提出将3D参数建模为随机变量而非SDS中的常数，并提出了变分分数蒸馏（VSD），这是一个基于粒子的原则性变分框架，用于解释和解决文本到3D生成中的上述问题。我们证明SDS是VSD的一个特例，并且在CFG权重较小和较大时都会导致较差的样本。相比之下，VSD能够像扩散模型中的祖先采样一样，在各种CFG权重下良好工作，并在使用常见CFG权重（如7.5）时同时提高多样性和样本质量。我们进一步提出了文本到3D设计空间中的各种改进，例如蒸馏时间表和密度初始化，这些与蒸馏算法正交但尚未得到充分探索。我们的整体方法称为ProlificDreamer，可以生成高渲染分辨率（即512×512）和高保真度的NeRF，具有丰富的结构和复杂效果（如烟雾和液滴）。此外，从NeRF初始化后，通过VSD微调的网格具有精细的细节和照片级真实感。项目页面和代码：https://ml.cs.tsinghua.edu.cn/prolificdreamer/

contrib.en: Proposes Variational Score Distillation (VSD), a particle-based variational framework for text-to-3D generation.
contrib.zh: 提出变分分数蒸馏（VSD），一种基于粒子的变分框架用于文本到3D生成。

contrib.en: Shows SDS is a special case of VSD, explaining over-saturation, over-smoothing, and low-diversity issues.
contrib.zh: 证明SDS是VSD的特例，解释了过饱和、过平滑和低多样性问题。

contrib.en: VSD works with normal CFG weights (e.g., 7.5) and improves diversity and sample quality simultaneously.
contrib.zh: VSD适用于正常CFG权重（如7.5），同时提升多样性和样本质量。

contrib.en: Introduces high-resolution rendering (512x512) and annealed time schedule for improved visual quality.
contrib.zh: 引入高分辨率渲染（512x512）和退火时间调度以提升视觉质量。

contrib.en: Proposes scene initialization for complex scene generation, enabling 360-degree high-fidelity NeRF.
contrib.zh: 提出场景初始化用于复杂场景生成，实现360度高保真NeRF。

contrib.en: Achieves photo-realistic textured meshes via VSD fine-tuning from NeRF initialization.
contrib.zh: 通过从NeRF初始化的VSD微调，实现照片级真实感的纹理网格。

limits.en: Generation takes hours, much slower than image generation by diffusion models.
limits.zh: 生成耗时数小时，远慢于扩散模型的图像生成。

limits.en: Camera poses during training are independent of scene structure, limiting detail for large scenes.
limits.zh: 训练中的相机位姿与场景结构无关，限制了大型场景的细节。

limits.en: Complex prompts may fail due to limited expressiveness of the base 2D model.
limits.zh: 复杂提示可能因基础2D模型表达能力有限而失败。

limits.en: Multi-face Janus problem may occur due to poor text-image alignment for view-dependent prompts.
limits.zh: 由于视角相关提示的文本-图像对齐不佳，可能出现多面Janus问题。

limits.en: Potential harmful social impacts from content creation and generation of fake content.
limits.zh: 内容创作和虚假内容生成可能带来有害社会影响。

items.en: Score distillation sampling (SDS) has shown great promise in text-to-3D generation by distilling pretrained large-scale text-to-image diffusion models, but suffers from over-saturation, over-smoothing, and low-diversity problems. In this work, we propose to model the 3D parameter as a random variable instead of a constant as in SDS and present variational score distillation (VSD), a principled particle-based variational framework to explain and address the aforementioned issues in text-to-3D generation. We show that SDS is a special case of VSD and leads to poor samples with both small and large CFG weights. In comparison, VSD works well with various CFG weights as ancestral sampling from diffusion models and simultaneously improves the diversity and sample quality with a common CFG weight (i.e., 7.57.57.5). We further present various improvements in the design space for text-to-3D such as distillation time schedule and density initialization, which are orthogonal to the distillation algorithm yet not well explored. Our overall approach, dubbed ProlificDreamer, can generate high rendering resolution (i.e., 512×512512512512\times 512) and high-fidelity NeRF with rich structure and complex effects (e.g., smoke and drops). Further, initialized from NeRF, meshes fine-tuned by VSD are meticulously detailed and photo-realistic. Project page and codes: https://ml.cs.tsinghua.edu.cn/prolificdreamer/.
items.zh: 分数蒸馏采样（SDS）在通过蒸馏预训练的大规模文本到图像扩散模型进行文本到3D生成方面显示出巨大潜力，但存在过饱和、过平滑和低多样性问题。在这项工作中，我们提出将3D参数建模为随机变量而非SDS中的常数，并提出了变分分数蒸馏（VSD），这是一个基于粒子的原则性变分框架，用于解释和解决文本到3D生成中的上述问题。我们表明SDS是VSD的一个特例，并且在CFG权重较小和较大时都会导致较差的样本。相比之下，VSD在各种CFG权重下都能很好地工作，如同从扩散模型中进行祖先采样，并在使用常见CFG权重（即7.5）时同时提高多样性和样本质量。我们进一步提出了文本到3D设计空间中的各种改进，例如蒸馏时间表和密度初始化，这些与蒸馏算法正交但尚未得到充分探索。我们的整体方法称为ProlificDreamer，可以生成高渲染分辨率（即512×512）和高保真度的NeRF，具有丰富的结构和复杂效果（例如烟雾和液滴）。此外，从NeRF初始化后，通过VSD微调的网格具有精细的细节和照片级真实感。项目页面和代码：https://ml.cs.tsinghua.edu.cn/prolificdreamer/。

items.capEn: (a) ProlificDreamer can generate meticulously detailed and photo-realistic 3D textured meshes.
items.capZh: (a) ProlificDreamer可以生成具有精细细节和照片级真实感的3D纹理网格。

items.capEn: (b) ProlificDreamer can generate high rendering resolution (i.e., 512×512512512512\times 512) and high-fidelity NeRF with rich structures and complex effects. Besides, the bottom results show that ProlificDreamer can generate complex scenes with 360∘superscript360360^{\circ} views because of our scene initialization (see Sec. 4.2).
items.capZh: (b) ProlificDreamer可以生成高渲染分辨率（即512×512）和高保真度的NeRF，具有丰富的结构和复杂效果。此外，底部结果显示，由于我们的场景初始化（见第4.2节），ProlificDreamer可以生成具有360°视角的复杂场景。

items.capEn: (c) ProlificDreamer can generate diverse and semantically correct 3D scenes given the same text.
items.capZh: (c) 给定相同的文本，ProlificDreamer可以生成多样且语义正确的3D场景。

items.en: 3D content and technologies enable us to visualize, comprehend, and interact with complex objects and environments that are reflective of our real-life experiences. Their pivotal role extends across a wide array of domains, encompassing architecture, animation, gaming, and the rapidly evolving fields of virtual and augmented reality. In spite of the extensive applications, the production of premium 3D content often remains a formidable task. It necessitates a significant investment of time and effort, even when undertaken by professional designers. This challenge has prompted the development of text-to-3D methods [19, 31, 34, 20, 4, 29, 55, 16]. By automating the generation of 3D content based on textual descriptions, these innovative methods present a promising way towards streamlining the 3D content creation process. Furthermore, they stand to make this process more accessible, potentially encouraging a significant paradigm shift in the aforementioned fields.
items.zh: 3D内容和技术使我们能够可视化、理解并与反映现实生活体验的复杂对象和环境进行交互。它们在建筑、动画、游戏以及快速发展的虚拟现实和增强现实等广泛领域中发挥着关键作用。尽管应用广泛，但优质3D内容的制作通常仍然是一项艰巨的任务。即使由专业设计师完成，也需要大量的时间和精力投入。这一挑战促使了文本到3D方法的发展[19, 31, 34, 20, 4, 29, 55, 16]。通过基于文本描述自动生成3D内容，这些创新方法为简化3D内容创建过程提供了一条有希望的途径。此外，它们有望使这一过程更加易于访问，可能推动上述领域的重大范式转变。

items.en: Diffusion models [46, 14, 49] have significantly advanced text-to-image synthesis [36, 41, 38, 1], particularly when trained on large-scale datasets [43]. Inspired by these developments, DreamFusion [34] employs a pretrained, large-scale text-to-image diffusion model for the generation of 3D content from text in the wild, circumventing the need for any 3D data. DreamFusion introduces the Score Distillation Sampling (SDS) algorithm to optimize a single 3D representation such that the image rendered from any view maintains a high likelihood as evaluated by the diffusion model, given the text. Despite its wide application [20, 4, 29, 55], empirical observations [34] indicate that SDS often suffers from over-saturation, over-smoothing, and low-diversity problems, which have yet to be thoroughly explained or adequately addressed. Additionally, orthogonal elements in the design space for text-to-3D, such as rendering resolution and distillation time schedule, have not been fully explored, suggesting a significant potential for further improvement. In this paper, we present a systematic study of all these elements to obtain elaborate 3D representations.
items.zh: 扩散模型[46, 14, 49]显著推进了文本到图像合成[36, 41, 38, 1]，特别是在大规模数据集[43]上训练时。受这些发展的启发，DreamFusion [34]利用预训练的大规模文本到图像扩散模型从野外文本生成3D内容，从而避免了对任何3D数据的需要。DreamFusion引入了分数蒸馏采样（SDS）算法来优化单个3D表示，使得从任何视图渲染的图像在给定文本的情况下，由扩散模型评估时具有高似然性。尽管其应用广泛[20, 4, 29, 55]，但经验观察[34]表明，SDS经常遭受过饱和、过平滑和低多样性问题，这些问题尚未得到彻底解释或充分解决。此外，文本到3D设计空间中的正交元素，如渲染分辨率和蒸馏时间表，尚未得到充分探索，表明有进一步改进的巨大潜力。在本文中，我们对所有这些元素进行了系统研究，以获得精细的3D表示。

items.en: We first present Variational Score Distillation (VSD), which treats the corresponding 3D scene given a textual prompt as a random variable instead of a single point as in SDS [34]. VSD optimizes a distribution of 3D scenes such that the distribution induced on images rendered from all views aligns as closely as possible, in terms of KL divergence, with the one defined by the pretrained 2D diffusion model (see Sec. 3.1). Under this variational formulation, VSD naturally characterizes the phenomenon that multiple 3D scenes can potentially align with one prompt. To solve it efficiently, VSD adopts particle-based variational inference [23, 3, 9], and maintains a set of 3D parameters as particles to represent the 3D distribution. We derive a novel gradient-based update rule for the particles via the Wasserstein gradient flow (see Sec. 3.2) and guarantee that the particles will be samples from the desired distribution when the optimization converges (see Theorem 2). Our update requires estimating the score function of the distribution on diffused rendered images, which can be efficiently and effectively implemented by a low-rank adaptation (LoRA) [18, 40] of the pretrained diffusion model. The final algorithm alternatively updates the particles and score function.
items.zh: 我们首先提出变分分数蒸馏（VSD），它将给定文本提示的相应3D场景视为随机变量，而不是SDS [34]中的单个点。VSD优化3D场景的分布，使得从所有视图渲染的图像上诱导的分布在KL散度方面与预训练2D扩散模型定义的分布尽可能对齐（见第3.1节）。在这种变分公式下，VSD自然地刻画了多个3D场景可能与一个提示对齐的现象。为了高效求解，VSD采用基于粒子的变分推理[23, 3, 9]，并维护一组3D参数作为粒子来表示3D分布。我们通过Wasserstein梯度流推导出粒子的新颖基于梯度的更新规则（见第3.2节），并保证当优化收敛时，粒子将是所需分布的样本（见定理2）。我们的更新需要估计扩散渲染图像分布的分数函数，这可以通过预训练扩散模型的低秩适应（LoRA）[18, 40]高效且有效地实现。最终算法交替更新粒子和分数函数。

items.en: We show that SDS is a special case of VSD, by using a single-point Dirac distribution as the variational distribution (see Sec. 3.3). This insight explains the restricted diversity and fidelity of the generated 3D scenes by SDS. Moreover, even with a single particle, VSD can learn a parametric score model, potentially offering superior generalization over SDS. We also empirically compare SDS and VSD in 2D space by using an identity rendering function that isolates other 3D factors. Similar to ancestral sampling from diffusion models, VSD is able to produce realistic samples using a normal CFG weight (i.e., 7.5). In contrast, SDS exhibits inferior results, sharing the same issues previously observed in text-to-3D, such as over-saturation and over-smoothing [34].
items.zh: 我们表明SDS是VSD的一个特例，通过使用单点Dirac分布作为变分分布（见第3.3节）。这一见解解释了SDS生成的3D场景的受限多样性和保真度。此外，即使使用单个粒子，VSD也可以学习参数化分数模型，可能比SDS提供更好的泛化。我们还通过使用恒等渲染函数（隔离其他3D因素）在2D空间中经验比较了SDS和VSD。类似于从扩散模型进行祖先采样，VSD能够使用正常的CFG权重（即7.5）生成逼真的样本。相比之下，SDS表现出较差的结果，具有先前在文本到3D中观察到的相同问题，例如过饱和和过平滑[34]。

items.en: We further systematically study other elements orthogonal to the algorithm for text-to-3D and present a clear design space in Sec. 4. Specifically, we propose a high rendering resolution of 512×512512512512\times 512 during training and an annealed distilling time schedule to improve the visual quality. We also propose scene initialization, which is crucial for complex scene generation. Comprehensive ablations in Sec. 5 demonstrate the effectiveness of all the aforementioned elements particularly for VSD. Our overall approach can generate high-fidelity and diverse 3D results. We term it as ProlificDreamer111A prolific dreamer is someone who experiences vivid dreams quite regularly [50], which corresponds to the high-fidelity and diverse results of our method..
items.zh: 我们进一步系统研究了与文本到3D算法正交的其他元素，并在第4节中提出了清晰的设计空间。具体来说，我们提出了训练期间的高渲染分辨率512×512和退火蒸馏时间表以提高视觉质量。我们还提出了场景初始化，这对于复杂场景生成至关重要。第5节中的全面消融实验证明了所有上述元素的有效性，特别是对于VSD。我们的整体方法可以生成高保真度和多样化的3D结果。我们将其称为ProlificDreamer¹。

items.en: As shown in Fig. 1(c) and Sec. 5, ProlificDreamer can generate 512×512512512512\times 512 rendering resolution and high-fidelity Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF) with rich structure and complex effects (e.g., smoke and drops). Besides, for the first time, ProlificDreamer can successfully construct complex scenes with multiple objects in 360∘superscript360360^{\circ} views given the textual prompt. Further, initialized from the generated NeRF, ProlificDreamer can generate meticulously detailed and photo-realistic 3D textured meshes.
items.zh: 如图1(c)和第5节所示，ProlificDreamer可以生成512×512渲染分辨率和高保真度的神经辐射场（NeRF），具有丰富的结构和复杂效果（例如烟雾和液滴）。此外，ProlificDreamer首次能够根据文本提示成功构建具有多个对象的360°视角复杂场景。进一步，从生成的NeRF初始化后，ProlificDreamer可以生成具有精细细节和照片级真实感的3D纹理网格。

items.en: We present preliminaries on diffusion models, score distillation sampling, and 3D representations.
items.zh: 我们介绍了扩散模型、分数蒸馏采样和3D表示的预备知识。

In practice, classifier-free guidance (CFG [15]) is a key technique for trading off the quality and diversity of the samples, which modifies the model by ϵ^ϕ​(𝒙t,t,y)≔(1+s)​ϵϕ​(𝒙t,t,y)−s​ϵϕ​(𝒙t,t,∅)≔subscript^bold-italic-ϵitalic-ϕsubscript𝒙𝑡𝑡𝑦1𝑠subscriptbold-italic-ϵitalic-ϕsubscript𝒙𝑡𝑡𝑦𝑠subscriptbold-italic-ϵitalic-ϕsubscript𝒙𝑡𝑡\hat{\bm{\epsilon}}_{\phi}({\bm{x}}_{t},t,y)\coloneqq(1+s){\bm{\epsilon}}_{\phi}({\bm{x}}_{t},t,y)-s{\bm{\epsilon}}_{\phi}({\bm{x}}_{t},t,\varnothing), where ∅\varnothing is a special “empty” text prompt representing for the unconditional case, and s>0𝑠0s>0 is the guidance scale. A larger guidance scale usually improves the text-image alignment but reduces diversity.
items.zh: 扩散模型最成功的应用之一是文本到图像生成[41, 36, 38]，其中噪声预测模型ϵφ(xt, t, y)以文本提示y为条件。在实践中，无分类器引导（CFG [15]）是权衡样本质量和多样性的关键技术，它通过ϵ̂φ(xt, t, y)≔(1+s)ϵφ(xt, t, y)−sϵφ(xt, t, ∅)修改模型，其中∅是表示无条件情况的特殊“空”文本提示，s>0是引导尺度。较大的引导尺度通常提高文本-图像对齐但降低多样性。

items.en: Text-to-3D generation by score distillation sampling (SDS) [34]. SDS is an optimization method by distilling pretrained diffusion models, also known as Score Jacobian Chaining (SJC) [55]. It is widely used in text-to-3D generation [34, 55, 20, 29, 55, 4] with great promise. items.en: Notwithstanding this progress, empirical observations [34] show that SDS often suffers from over-saturation, over-smoothing, and low-diversity issues, which have yet to be thoroughly explained or adequately addressed.
items.zh: 尽管取得了进展，但经验观察[34]表明SDS经常遭受过饱和、过平滑和低多样性问题，这些问题尚未得到彻底解释或充分解决。

items.en: 3D representations. We employ NeRF [30, 32] (Neural Radiance Fields) and textured mesh [45] as two popular and important types of 3D representations. In particular, NeRF represents 3D objects using a multilayer perceptron (MLP) that takes coordinates in a 3D space as input and outputs the corresponding color and density. Here, θ𝜃\theta corresponds to the parameters of the MLP. Given camera pose c𝑐c, the rendering process 𝒈​(θ,c)𝒈𝜃𝑐{\bm{g}}(\theta,c) is defined as casting rays from pixels and computing the weighted sum of the color of the sampling points along each ray to composite the color of each pixel. NeRF is flexible for optimization and is capable of representing extremely complex scenes. Textured mesh [45] represents the geometry of a 3D object with triangle meshes and the texture with color on the mesh surface. Here the 3D parameter θ𝜃\theta consists of the parameters to represent the coordinates of triangle meshes and parameters of the texture. The rendering process 𝒈​(θ,c)𝒈𝜃𝑐{\bm{g}}(\theta,c) given camera pose c𝑐c is defined by casting rays from pixels and computing the intersections between rays and mesh surfaces to obtain the color of each pixel. The textured mesh allows high-resolution and fast rendering with differentiable rasterization.
items.zh: 3D表示。我们采用NeRF [30, 32]（神经辐射场）和纹理网格[45]作为两种流行且重要的3D表示类型。特别地，NeRF使用多层感知器（MLP）表示3D对象，该MLP以3D空间中的坐标作为输入，并输出相应的颜色和密度。这里，θ对应于MLP的参数。给定相机姿态c，渲染过程g(θ,c)定义为从像素发射射线，并计算沿每条射线的采样点颜色的加权和，以合成每个像素的颜色。NeRF优化灵活，能够表示极其复杂的场景。纹理网格[45]使用三角形网格表示3D对象的几何形状，并使用网格表面的颜色表示纹理。这里3D参数θ包括表示三角形网格坐标的参数和纹理参数。给定相机姿态c，渲染过程g(θ,c)定义为从像素发射射线，并计算射线与网格表面的交点以获得每个像素的颜色。纹理网格允许通过可微光栅化进行高分辨率和快速渲染。

items.en: We now present Variational Score Distillation (VSD) (see Sec. 3.1) that learns to sample from a distribution of the 3D scenes. By using 3D parameter particles to represent the target 3D distribution, we derive a principled gradient-based update rule for the particles via the Wasserstein gradient flow (see Sec. 3.2). We further show that SDS is a special case of VSD and constructs an experiment in 2D space to study the optimization algorithm isolated from the 3D representations, explaining the practical issues of SDS both theoretically and empirically (see Sec. 3.3).
items.zh: 我们现在提出变分分数蒸馏（VSD）（见第3.1节），它学习从3D场景的分布中采样。通过使用3D参数粒子表示目标3D分布，我们通过Wasserstein梯度流推导出粒子的基于梯度的原则性更新规则（见第3.2节）。我们进一步表明SDS是VSD的一个特例，并在2D空间中构建实验以研究优化算法（与3D表示隔离），从理论和经验上解释了SDS的实际问题（见第3.3节）。

items.en: In practice, we parameterize ϵϕsubscriptbold-italic-ϵitalic-ϕ{\bm{\epsilon}}_{\phi} by either a small U-Net [39] or a LoRA (Low-rank adaptation [18, 40]) of the pretrained model ϵpretrain​(𝒙t,t,yc)subscriptbold-italic-ϵpretrainsubscript𝒙𝑡𝑡superscript𝑦𝑐{\bm{\epsilon}}_{\text{pretrain}}({\bm{x}}_{t},t,y^{c}), and add additional camera parameter c𝑐c to the condition embeddings in the network. In most cases, we find that using LoRA can greatly improve the fidelity of the obtained samples (e.g., see results in Fig. 1(c)). We believe that it is because LoRA is designed for efficient few-shot fine-tuning and can leverage the prior information in ϵpretrainsubscriptbold-italic-ϵpretrain{\bm{\epsilon}}_{\text{pretrain}} (the information of both images and text corresponding to y𝑦y).
items.zh: 在实践中，我们通过一个小型 U-Net [39] 或预训练模型 ϵpretrain​(𝒙t,t,yc) 的 LoRA（低秩适应 [18, 40]）来参数化 ϵϕ，并将额外的相机参数 c 添加到网络中的条件嵌入中。在大多数情况下，我们发现使用 LoRA 可以大大提高所得样本的保真度（例如，见图 1(c) 中的结果）。我们认为这是因为 LoRA 专为高效的小样本微调而设计，并且可以利用 ϵpretrain 中的先验信息（与 y 对应的图像和文本信息）。

Thus, we optimize ϵϕsubscriptbold-italic-ϵitalic-ϕ{\bm{\epsilon}}_{\phi} and θ(i)superscript𝜃𝑖\theta^{(i)} alternately, and each particle θ(i)superscript𝜃𝑖\theta^{(i)} is updated by θ(i)←θ(i)−η​∇θℒVSD​(θ(i))←superscript𝜃𝑖superscript𝜃𝑖𝜂subscript∇𝜃subscriptℒVSDsuperscript𝜃𝑖\theta^{(i)}\leftarrow\theta^{(i)}-\eta\nabla_{\theta}{\mathcal{L}}_{\text{VSD}}(\theta^{(i)}), where η>0𝜂0\eta>0 is the step size (learning rate). items.en: We now systematically compare VSD with SDS in both theory and practice.
items.zh: 我们现在在理论和实践上系统地比较 VSD 和 SDS。

items.en: SDS as a special case of VSD. Theoretically, comparing the update rules of SDS (Eq. (3)) and VSD (Eq. (9)), SDS is a special case of VSD by using a single-point Dirac distribution μ​(θ|y)≈δ​(θ−θ(1))𝜇conditional𝜃𝑦𝛿𝜃superscript𝜃1\mu(\theta|y)\approx\delta(\theta-\theta^{(1)}) as the variational distribution (see Appendix C.3 for derivation). In particular, VSD not only employs potentially multiple particles but also learns a parametric score function ϵϕsubscriptbold-italic-ϵitalic-ϕ{\bm{\epsilon}}_{\phi} even for a single particle (i.e., n=1𝑛1n=1). Empirically, the learned neural network may potentially offer superior generalization ability over the Dirac distribution in SDS, thus it may provide more accurate updating directions in low-density regions. Moreover, by using LoRA, VSD can additionally exploit the text prompt y𝑦y in the estimation ϵϕ​(𝒙t,t,c,y)subscriptbold-italic-ϵitalic-ϕsubscript𝒙𝑡𝑡𝑐𝑦{\bm{\epsilon}}_{\phi}({\bm{x}}_{t},t,c,y), while the Gaussian noise ϵbold-italic-ϵ{\bm{\epsilon}} used in SDS cannot leverage the information from y𝑦y. Thus, VSD may provide samples which are more aligned with the prompt y𝑦y.
items.zh: SDS 作为 VSD 的特例。理论上，比较 SDS（方程 (3)）和 VSD（方程 (9)）的更新规则，SDS 是 VSD 的一个特例，它使用单点 Dirac 分布 μ​(θ|y)≈δ​(θ−θ(1)) 作为变分分布（推导见附录 C.3）。特别地，VSD 不仅可能使用多个粒子，而且即使对于单个粒子（即 n=1）也学习一个参数化分数函数 ϵϕ。经验上，学习的神经网络可能比 SDS 中的 Dirac 分布提供更好的泛化能力，因此可能在低密度区域提供更准确的更新方向。此外，通过使用 LoRA，VSD 可以在估计 ϵϕ​(𝒙t,t,c,y) 时额外利用文本提示 y，而 SDS 中使用的高斯噪声 ϵ 无法利用 y 的信息。因此，VSD 可能提供与提示 y 更一致的样本。

items.en: VSD is friendly to CFG. As VSD aims to sample θ𝜃\theta from the optimal μ∗superscript𝜇\mu^{*} defined by the pretrained model ϵpretrainsubscriptbold-italic-ϵpretrain{\bm{\epsilon}}_{\text{pretrain}}, the effects by tuning the CFG in ϵpretrainsubscriptbold-italic-ϵpretrain{\bm{\epsilon}}_{\text{pretrain}} for 3D sampling by VSD are quite similar to 2D sampling by the traditional ancestral sampling methods [14, 27]. Therefore, VSD can tune CFG as flexibly as the classic text-to-image methods, and we use the same setting of CFG (e.g. 7.57.57.5) as the common text-to-image generation task for the best performance. To the best of our knowledge, this for the first time addresses the problem in previous SDS [34, 20, 4, 29] that it usually requires a large CFG (i.e., 100100100).
items.zh: VSD 对 CFG 友好。由于 VSD 旨在从由预训练模型 ϵpretrain 定义的最优 μ∗ 中采样 θ，因此通过调整 ϵpretrain 中的 CFG 对 VSD 进行 3D 采样的效果与通过传统祖先采样方法 [14, 27] 进行 2D 采样的效果非常相似。因此，VSD 可以像经典的文本到图像方法一样灵活地调整 CFG，并且我们使用与常见文本到图像生成任务相同的 CFG 设置（例如 7.5）以获得最佳性能。据我们所知，这首次解决了先前 SDS [34, 20, 4, 29] 中通常需要大 CFG（即 100）的问题。

items.en: VSD vs. SDS in 2D experiments that isolate 3D representations. To directly compare SDS and VSD, we consider a special case of the rendering function 𝒈​(θ)𝒈𝜃{\bm{g}}(\theta) to decouple the optimization algorithm from 3D representations. In particular, we set 𝒈​(θ,c)≡θ𝒈𝜃𝑐𝜃{\bm{g}}(\theta,c)\equiv\theta for any c𝑐c. Then the rendered image 𝒙=𝒈​(θ,c)=θ𝒙𝒈𝜃𝑐𝜃{\bm{x}}={\bm{g}}(\theta,c)=\theta is the same 2D image as θ𝜃\theta. In such a case, optimizing the parameter θ𝜃\theta is equivalent to generating an image in 2D space, thereby independent of the 3D representation. We show the results of different sampling methods in Fig. 3. SDS exhibits failure under both small and large CFG weights. Particularly with the default CFG weight (i.e., 100) used in SDS, the 2D samples share the same issues previously observed in text-to-3D such as over-saturation and over-smoothing [34]. In contrast, VSD demonstrates flexibility in accommodating various CFG weights and produces realistic samples using a normal CFG weight (i.e., 7.5), behaving similarly to ancestral sampling from diffusion models. See more details and analysis in Appendix G.
items.zh: VSD 与 SDS 在隔离 3D 表示的 2D 实验中的比较。为了直接比较 SDS 和 VSD，我们考虑渲染函数 𝒈​(θ) 的一个特例，以将优化算法与 3D 表示解耦。特别地，我们设置 𝒈​(θ,c)≡θ 对于任何 c。那么渲染图像 𝒙=𝒈​(θ,c)=θ 是与 θ 相同的 2D 图像。在这种情况下，优化参数 θ 等价于在 2D 空间中生成图像，因此独立于 3D 表示。我们在图 3 中展示了不同采样方法的结果。SDS 在小和大 CFG 权重下都表现出失败。特别是在 SDS 中使用的默认 CFG 权重（即 100）下，2D 样本具有先前在文本到 3D 中观察到的问题，如过饱和和过平滑 [34]。相比之下，VSD 表现出适应各种 CFG 权重的灵活性，并使用正常的 CFG 权重（即 7.5）生成逼真的样本，行为类似于扩散模型的祖先采样。更多细节和分析见附录 G。

items.en: As other 3D factors are isolated in this comparison, these theoretical and empirical results suggest that the aforementioned practical issues of SDS [34] stem from the oversimplified variational distribution and large CFG employed by SDS. Such results strongly motivate us to employ VSD for text-to-3D generation, where it still substantially and consistently outperforms SDS (see evidence in Sec 5).
items.zh: 由于在此比较中其他3D因素被隔离，这些理论和实证结果表明，SDS [34] 前述的实际问题源于其过于简化的变分分布和较大的CFG。这些结果强烈促使我们在文本到3D生成中使用VSD，其中VSD仍然显著且一致地优于SDS（见第5节的证据）。

items.en: We further present a clear design space for text-to-3D in Sec. 4.1 and systematically study other elements orthogonal to the distillation algorithm in Sec. 4.2. Combining all improvements highlighted in Tab. 1, we arrive at ProlificDreamer, an advanced text-to-3D approach.
items.zh: 我们进一步在第4.1节中提出了文本到3D的清晰设计空间，并在第4.2节中系统研究了与蒸馏算法正交的其他元素。结合表1中强调的所有改进，我们得到了ProlificDreamer，一种先进的文本到3D方法。

items.capEn: Figure 4: Comparison with baselines. Our results have higher fidelity and more details.
items.capZh: 图4：与基线的比较。我们的结果具有更高的保真度和更多细节。

full.secZh: 4.1 文本到3D生成的设计空间

items.en: We adopt the two-stage approach [20], with several improvements in the design space of text-to-3D generation as summarized in Table 1. Specifically, in the first stage, we optimize a high-resolution (e.g., 512512512) NeRF by VSD to utilize its high flexibility for generating scenes with complex geometry. In the second stage, we use DMTet [45] to extract textured mesh from the NeRF obtained in the first stage, and further fine-tune the textured mesh for high-resolution details. The second stage is optional because both NeRF and mesh have their own advantages in representing 3D content and are preferred in certain cases. Nevertheless, ProlificDreamer can generate both high-fidelity NeRFs and meshes.
items.zh: 我们采用两阶段方法 [20]，并在文本到3D生成的设计空间中进行了若干改进，如表1所示。具体来说，在第一阶段，我们通过VSD优化高分辨率（例如512×512×512）的NeRF，以利用其高灵活性生成具有复杂几何的场景。在第二阶段，我们使用DMTet [45] 从第一阶段获得的NeRF中提取纹理网格，并进一步微调纹理网格以获得高分辨率细节。第二阶段是可选的，因为NeRF和网格在表示3D内容方面各有优势，并在某些情况下更受青睐。尽管如此，ProlificDreamer可以生成高保真的NeRF和网格。

items.en: We systematically study other elements orthogonal to the algorithmic formulation. Specifically, we propose a high rendering resolution of 512×512512512512\times 512 during training and an annealed distilling time schedule to improve the visual quality. We also carefully design a scene initialization, which is crucial for complex scene generation.
items.zh: 我们系统研究了与算法公式正交的其他元素。具体来说，我们提出了训练期间512×512的高渲染分辨率和退火蒸馏时间表，以提高视觉质量。我们还精心设计了场景初始化，这对复杂场景生成至关重要。

items.en: High-resolution rendering for NeRF training. We choose Instant NGP [32] for efficient high-resolution rendering and optimize NeRF with up to 512 training resolution using VSD. By applying VSD, we obtain high-fidelity NeRFs with resolutions varying from 646464 to 512512512.
items.zh: NeRF训练的高分辨率渲染。我们选择Instant NGP [32] 进行高效的高分辨率渲染，并使用VSD优化分辨率高达512的NeRF。通过应用VSD，我们获得了分辨率从64到512的高保真NeRF。

items.en: Scene initialization for NeRF training. We initialize the density for NeRF as σinit​(𝝁)=λσ​(1−‖𝝁‖2r)subscript𝜎init𝝁subscript𝜆𝜎1subscriptnorm𝝁2𝑟\sigma_{\small\text{init}}({\bm{\mu}})=\lambda_{\sigma}\,(1-\frac{||{\bm{\mu}}||_{2}}{r}), where λσsubscript𝜆𝜎\lambda_{\sigma} is the density strength, r𝑟r is the density radius, and 𝝁𝝁{\bm{\mu}} is the coordinate. For object-centric scenes, we follow the object-centric initialization used in Magic3D [20] with λσ=10subscript𝜆𝜎10\lambda_{\sigma}=10 and r=0.5𝑟0.5r=0.5; For complex scenes, we propose scene initialization by setting λσ=−10subscript𝜆𝜎10\lambda_{\sigma}=-10 to make the density “hollow” and r=2.5𝑟2.5r=2.5 that encloses the camera. We show in Appendix D that the scene initialization can help to generate high-fidelity complex scenes without other modifications to the existing algorithm. In addition, we can further add a centric object to the complex scene by using object-centric initialization for ‖𝝁‖2<5/6subscriptnorm𝝁256||{\bm{\mu}}||_{2}<5/6 and scene initialization for others, where the hyperparameter 5/6565/6 ensures the initial density function is continuous.
items.zh: NeRF训练的场景初始化。我们将NeRF的密度初始化为 σ_init(μ) = λ_σ (1 - ||μ||_2 / r)，其中 λ_σ 是密度强度，r 是密度半径，μ 是坐标。对于以物体为中心的场景，我们遵循Magic3D [20] 中使用的以物体为中心的初始化，λ_σ=10，r=0.5；对于复杂场景，我们提出场景初始化，设置 λ_σ=-10 使密度“空心”，r=2.5 包围相机。我们在附录D中展示，仅通过场景初始化，无需对现有算法进行其他修改，即可生成高保真复杂场景。此外，我们可以通过为 ||μ||_2 < 5/6 使用以物体为中心的初始化，为其他区域使用场景初始化，向复杂场景添加中心物体，其中超参数5/6确保初始密度函数连续。

items.en: Annealed time schedule for score distillation. We utilize a simple two-stage annealing of time step t𝑡t in the score distillation objective, suitable for both SDS (Eq. (3)) and VSD (Eq. (9)). For the first several steps we sample time steps t∼𝒰​(0.02,0.98)similar-to𝑡𝒰0.020.98t\sim{\mathcal{U}}(0.02,0.98) and then anneal into t∼𝒰​(0.02,0.50)similar-to𝑡𝒰0.020.50t\sim{\mathcal{U}}(0.02,0.50). The key insight is that, essentially, we aim to match the original q0μ​(𝒙0|c,y)superscriptsubscript𝑞0𝜇conditionalsubscript𝒙0𝑐𝑦q_{0}^{\mu}({\bm{x}}_{0}|c,y) with p0​(𝒙0|yc)subscript𝑝0conditionalsubscript𝒙0superscript𝑦𝑐p_{0}({\bm{x}}_{0}|y^{c}). The KL-divergence for larger t𝑡t can provide reasonable optimization direction during the early stage of training. During training, while 𝒙∗superscript𝒙{\bm{x}}^{*} is approaching the support of p0​(𝒙∗|yc)subscript𝑝0conditionalsuperscript𝒙superscript𝑦𝑐p_{0}({\bm{x}}^{*}|y^{c}), a smaller t𝑡t can narrow the gap between pt​(𝒙∗|yc)subscript𝑝𝑡conditionalsuperscript𝒙superscript𝑦𝑐p_{t}({\bm{x}}^{*}|y^{c}) and p0​(𝒙∗|yc)subscript𝑝0conditionalsuperscript𝒙superscript𝑦𝑐p_{0}({\bm{x}}^{*}|y^{c}), and provide elaborate details aligning with p0​(𝒙∗|yc)subscript𝑝0conditionalsuperscript𝒙superscript𝑦𝑐p_{0}({\bm{x}}^{*}|y^{c}).
items.zh: 分数蒸馏的退火时间表。我们在分数蒸馏目标中使用简单的两阶段退火时间步 t，适用于SDS（式(3)）和VSD（式(9)）。前几步我们采样时间步 t ~ U(0.02, 0.98)，然后退火到 t ~ U(0.02, 0.50)。关键见解是，本质上我们旨在将原始 q_0^μ(x_0|c,y) 与 p_0(x_0|y^c) 匹配。较大 t 的KL散度可以在训练早期提供合理的优化方向。在训练过程中，当 x* 接近 p_0(x*|y^c) 的支持集时，较小的 t 可以缩小 p_t(x*|y^c) 与 p_0(x*|y^c) 之间的差距，并提供与 p_0(x*|y^c) 一致的精细细节。

items.en: Mesh representation and fine-tuning. We adopt a coordinate-based hash grid encoder inherited from NeRF stage to represent the mesh texture. We follow Fantasia3D [4] to disentangle the optimization of geometry and texture by first optimizing the geometry using the normal map and then optimizing the texture. In our initial experiments, we find that optimizing geometry with VSD provides no more details than using SDS. This may be because the mesh resolution is not large enough to represent high-frequency details. Thus, we optimize geometry with SDS for efficiency. But unlike Fantasia3D [4], our texture optimization is supervised by VSD with CFG = 7.5 with the annealed time schedule, which can provide more details than SDS.
items.zh: 网格表示与微调。我们采用从NeRF阶段继承的基于坐标的哈希网格编码器来表示网格纹理。我们遵循Fantasia3D [4]，通过首先使用法线图优化几何，然后优化纹理，将几何和纹理的优化解耦。在我们的初步实验中，我们发现使用VSD优化几何并不比使用SDS提供更多细节。这可能是因为网格分辨率不足以表示高频细节。因此，我们使用SDS优化几何以提高效率。但与Fantasia3D [4] 不同，我们的纹理优化由VSD监督，CFG=7.5，并采用退火时间表，这比SDS能提供更多细节。

items.capEn: Figure 5: Ablation study of proposed improvements for high-fidelity NeRF generation. The prompt is an elephant skull. (1) The common setting [34, 20] adopts 646464 rendering resolution and SDS loss. (2) We improve the generated quality by increasing the rendering resolution. (3) Annealed time schedule adds more details to the generated result. (4) VSD makes the results even better with richer details.
items.capZh: 图5：高保真NeRF生成中提出改进的消融研究。提示词是“一个象头骨”。(1) 常见设置 [34, 20] 采用64渲染分辨率和SDS损失。(2) 我们通过增加渲染分辨率来提高生成质量。(3) 退火时间表为生成结果添加了更多细节。(4) VSD使结果更好，细节更丰富。

items.en: We show the generated results of ProlificDreamer in Fig. 1(a) and 1(b), including high-fidelity mesh and NeRF results. All the results are generated by VSD. For all experiments without mentioned, VSD uses n=1𝑛1n=1 particle for a fair comparison with SDS. In Fig. 1(c), we also demonstrate VSD can generate diverse results, showing that different particles in a round are diverse (with n=4𝑛4n=4).
items.zh: 我们在图1(a)和1(b)中展示了ProlificDreamer的生成结果，包括高保真网格和NeRF结果。所有结果均由VSD生成。除非另有说明，所有实验中VSD使用n=1个粒子，以便与SDS公平比较。在图1(c)中，我们还展示了VSD可以生成多样化的结果，表明一轮中的不同粒子是多样化的（n=4）。

items.en: Object-centric generation. We compare our method with three SOTA baselines, DreamFusion [34], Magic3D [20] and Fantasia3D [4]. All of the baselines are based on SDS. Since none of them is open-sourced, we use the figures from their papers. As shown in Fig. 4, ProlificDreamer generates 3D objects with higher fidelity and more details, which demonstrates the effectiveness of our method.
items.zh: 以物体为中心的生成。我们将我们的方法与三个SOTA基线进行比较：DreamFusion [34]、Magic3D [20] 和 Fantasia3D [4]。所有基线均基于SDS。由于它们均未开源，我们使用其论文中的图片。如图4所示，ProlificDreamer生成的3D物体具有更高的保真度和更多细节，这证明了我们方法的有效性。

items.en: In appendix, we add user study (Section J) and quantitative results (Section K) of ProlificDreamer against the baselines to demonstrate the effectiveness of our method.
items.zh: 在附录中，我们添加了ProlificDreamer与基线的用户研究（第J节）和定量结果（第K节），以证明我们方法的有效性。

items.en: Large scene generation. As shown in Fig. 1(b), our method can generate 360∘superscript360360^{\circ} scenes with high-fidelity and fine details. The depth map shows that the scenes have geometry instead of being a 360∘superscript360360^{\circ} textured sphere, verifying that with our scene initialization alone we can generate high-fidelity large scenes without much modification to existing components. See more results in Appendix B.
items.zh: 大场景生成。如图1(b)所示，我们的方法可以生成360°场景，具有高保真度和精细细节。深度图显示场景具有几何结构，而不是360°纹理球体，验证了仅通过我们的场景初始化，无需对现有组件进行大量修改，即可生成高保真大场景。更多结果见附录B。

items.en: Ablation on NeRF training. Fig. 5 provides the ablation on NeRF training. Starting from the common setting [34, 20] with 64 rendering resolution and SDS loss, we ablate our proposed improvements step by step, including increasing resolution, adding annealed time schedule, and adding VSD all improve the generated results. It demonstrates the effectiveness of our proposed components. We provide more ablation on large scene generation in Appendix D, with a similar conclusion.
items.zh: NeRF训练的消融。图5提供了NeRF训练的消融。从常见设置 [34, 20] 的64渲染分辨率和SDS损失开始，我们逐步消融提出的改进，包括增加分辨率、添加退火时间表和添加VSD，均改善了生成结果。这证明了我们提出组件的有效性。我们在附录D中提供了大场景生成的更多消融，结论类似。

items.en: Ablation on mesh fine-tuning. We ablate between SDS and VSD on mesh fine-tuning, as shown in Appendix D. Fine-tuning texture with VSD provides higher fidelity than SDS. As the fine-tuned results of textured mesh are highly dependent on the initial NeRF, getting a high-quality NeRF at the first stage is crucial. Note that the provided results of both VSD and SDS in mesh fine-tuning are based on and benefit from the high-fidelity NeRF results in the first stage by our VSD.
items.zh: 网格微调的消融。我们在网格微调中对SDS和VSD进行消融，如附录D所示。使用VSD微调纹理比SDS提供更高的保真度。由于纹理网格的微调结果高度依赖于初始NeRF，因此在第一阶段获得高质量的NeRF至关重要。注意，网格微调中VSD和SDS的结果均基于并受益于第一阶段由我们的VSD获得的高保真NeRF结果。

items.en: Ablation on CFG. We perform ablation to explore how CFG affects generation diversity. We find that smaller CFG encourages more diversity. Our VSD works well with small CFG and provides considerable diversity, while SDS cannot generate plausible results with small CFG (e.g., 7.57.57.5), which limits its ability to generate diverse results. Results and more details are shown in Appendix H.
items.zh: CFG的消融。我们进行消融以探索CFG如何影响生成多样性。我们发现较小的CFG鼓励更多多样性。我们的VSD在较小的CFG下工作良好并提供可观的多样性，而SDS在较小的CFG（例如7.5）下无法生成合理的结果，这限制了其生成多样化结果的能力。结果和更多细节见附录H。

items.en: Score-based generative model [48, 49] and diffusion models [14] have shown great performance in image synthesis [14, 7]. Recently, large-scale diffusion models have shown great performance in text-to-image synthesis [36, 41, 38], which provides an opportunity to utilize it for zero-shot text-to-3D generation.
items.zh: 基于分数的生成模型 [48, 49] 和扩散模型 [14] 在图像合成中表现出色 [14, 7]。最近，大规模扩散模型在文本到图像合成中表现出色 [36, 41, 38]，这为将其用于零样本文本到3D生成提供了机会。

items.en: DreamField [19] proposes a text-to-3D method using CLIP [35] guidance. DreamFusion [34] proposes a text-to-3D method using 2D diffusion models. Score Jacobian Chaining (SJC) [55] derives the training objective of text-to-3D using a 2D diffusion model from another theoretical basis. Magic3D [20] extends text-to-3D to a higher resolution with mesh [45] representation. Latent-NeRF [29] optimizes NeRF in latent space. Fantasia3D [4] optimizes a mesh with DMTet [45] from scratch. Although Fantasia3D achieves remarkable zero-shot text-to-3D generation, it requires user-provided shape guidance for the generation of complex geometry. [17] propose score debiasing and prompt debiasing to mitigate multiface problem and is orthogonal to our work. TextMesh [52] is contemporary with us and proposes a different pipeline for high-fidelity text-to-3D generation. 3DFuse [44] proposes to incorporate 3D awareness into 2D diffusion for better 3D consistency in text-to-3D generation. In addition, adjusting time schedule has also been discussed in previous works [12, 55]. However, previous works either require carefully devising the schedule [12] or perform inferior to the simple random time schedule [55]. Instead, our 2-stage annealing schedule is easy to train and achieves better generation quality than the random time schedule.
items.zh: DreamField [19] 提出了一种使用CLIP [35] 指导的文本到3D方法。DreamFusion [34] 提出了一种使用2D扩散模型的文本到3D方法。Score Jacobian Chaining (SJC) [55] 从另一个理论基础推导了使用2D扩散模型的文本到3D训练目标。Magic3D [20] 将文本到3D扩展到更高分辨率，并使用网格 [45] 表示。Latent-NeRF [29] 在潜在空间中优化NeRF。Fantasia3D [4] 从头开始使用DMTet [45] 优化网格。尽管Fantasia3D实现了显著的零样本文本到3D生成，但它需要用户提供的形状指导来生成复杂几何。[17] 提出了分数去偏和提示去偏以缓解多面问题，与我们的工作正交。TextMesh [52] 与我们同期，提出了一个不同的高保真文本到3D生成流水线。3DFuse [44] 提出将3D感知融入2D扩散，以在文本到3D生成中获得更好的3D一致性。此外，调整时间表在先前的工作中也有讨论 [12, 55]。然而，先前的工作要么需要精心设计时间表 [12]，要么性能不如简单的随机时间表 [55]。相反，我们的两阶段退火时间表易于训练，并且比随机时间表实现了更好的生成质量。

items.en: Text2Room [16] generates indoor rooms from a given prompt. However, it uses additional monocular depth estimation models as prior, and we do not use any additional models. Our method generates the wild text prompt and uses only a text-to-image diffusion model. Set-the-scene [5] is a contemporary work with us aimed at large scene generation with a different pipeline. Overall, ProlificDreamer uses an advanced optimization algorithm, i.e, VSD with our proposed two-stage annealed time schedule, which has a significant advantage over the previous SDS / SJC (see Appendix C.3 for details). As a result, ProlificDreamer achieves high-fidelity NeRF with rich structure and complex effects (e.g., smoke and drops) and photo-realistic mesh results.
items.zh: Text2Room [16] 从给定提示生成室内房间。然而，它使用了额外的单目深度估计模型作为先验，而我们没有使用任何额外模型。我们的方法生成任意文本提示，仅使用文本到图像扩散模型。Set-the-scene [5] 是与我们同期的工作，旨在使用不同流水线生成大场景。总的来说，ProlificDreamer使用了先进的优化算法，即带有我们提出的两阶段退火时间表的VSD，这比之前的SDS/SJC具有显著优势（详见附录C.3）。因此，ProlificDreamer实现了具有丰富结构和复杂效果（如烟雾和液滴）的高保真NeRF以及照片级真实的网格结果。

items.en: In this work, we systematically study the problem of text-to-3D generation. In terms of the algorithmic formulation, we propose variational score distillation (VSD), a principled particle-based variational framework that treats the 3D parameter as a random variable and infers its distribution. VSD naturally generalizes SDS in the variational formulation and addresses the practical issues of SDS observed before. With other orthogonal improvements to 3D representations, our overall approach, ProlificDreamer, can generate high-fidelity NeRF and photo-realistic textured meshes.
items.zh: 在这项工作中，我们系统地研究了文本到3D生成的问题。在算法公式方面，我们提出了变分分数蒸馏（VSD），这是一个基于粒子的原则性变分框架，将3D参数视为随机变量并推断其分布。VSD在变分公式中自然地推广了SDS，并解决了之前观察到的SDS的实际问题。结合对3D表示的其他正交改进，我们的整体方法ProlificDreamer可以生成高保真度的NeRF和照片级真实感的纹理网格。

items.en: Limitations and broader impact. Although ProlificDreamer achieves remarkable text-to-3D results, the generation takes hours of time, which is much slower than image generation by a diffusion model. Although large scene generation can be achieved with our scene initialization, the camera poses during training are regardless of the scene structure, which may be improved by devising an adaptive camera pose range according to the scene structure for better-generated details. Moreover, due to the limited expressiveness of the base 2D model, the generation for complex prompts may fail, and the generated samples may have multi-face Janus problem [57] in some cases because of the poor text-image alignment for the view-dependent prompts. In addition, content creation by generative models may cause harmful social impacts on the labor market. Also, like other generative models, our method may be utilized to generate fake and malicious contents, which needs more caution.
items.zh: 局限性与更广泛的影响。尽管ProlificDreamer在文本到3D方面取得了显著成果，但生成过程需要数小时，这比扩散模型的图像生成慢得多。虽然通过我们的场景初始化可以实现大场景生成，但训练过程中的相机姿态与场景结构无关，这可以通过根据场景结构设计自适应相机姿态范围来改进，以获得更好的生成细节。此外，由于基础2D模型的表达能力有限，复杂提示的生成可能会失败，并且由于视图相关提示的文本-图像对齐较差，生成的样本在某些情况下可能会出现多面Janus问题[57]。另外，生成模型的内容创作可能对劳动力市场产生有害的社会影响。同时，与其他生成模型一样，我们的方法可能被用于生成虚假和恶意内容，这需要更加谨慎。
